ops.title: test_lint AST-mode test fails on macOS fresh envs (pre-existing, CI-green content)
ops.description: tests/test_lint.py::TestAstModeLint::test_ast_check_receives_tree fails deterministically on this macOS machine in ANY clean checkout/venv of captain-hook — bisected across the 9.9.0 stack all the way down to ab483542 (origin main pre-stack), whose ubuntu CI was green at the same content. Not state leakage (fails with pinned HOME/XDG_CACHE_HOME/CAPTAIN_HOOK_STATE_DIR), not a package delta (venv freeze identical to a passing env), not Python (3.13.13 both). The main working-copy checkout passes only because a concurrent session's uncommitted WIP touches ast_grep.py/dispatch.py/events.py. Root-cause the macOS-vs-ubuntu divergence in the AST lint dispatch path (lint mode detection or ast_grep integration) and either fix or make the test skip with a reason on the unsupported configuration. Repro: fresh `jj workspace add`, `uv run --extra dev pytest tests/test_lint.py::TestAstModeLint::test_ast_check_receives_tree`.

ops.text: failure reproduced and root-caused (macOS-specific mechanism named)
test passes or cleanly skips in a fresh macOS venv, and stays green in CI
